subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto him who desireth to drink from the Kawthar of utterance through the hands of his Lord's bounty, the Mighty, the Bountiful [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن اراد ان یشرب کوثر البیان من ایادی فضل ربه العزیز الکریم
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @suffering and imprisonment, @rejection, opposition and persecution
